name: EC2 instance metadata service v1 (IMDSv1) enabled
description: The Instance Metadata Service v1 (IMDSv1) does not require session tokens, making instances vulnerable to SSRF attacks that allow attackers to steal IAM credentials from the metadata service.
remediation: Set HttpTokens=required via: aws ec2 modify-instance-metadata-options --instance-id <id> --http-tokens required --http-put-response-hop-limit 1. Apply IMDSv2 enforcement at launch via IAM policy condition 'ec2:MetadataHttpTokens'.
